title: NEPA Environmental Assessment Rule Pack V0
description: Seed, evidence-gated rule pack for deterministic NEPA EA package review. Rules define the review question and retrieval requirements; findings are valid only when tied to source-library evidence.
jurisdiction: USDA Forest Service Region 1 source-library corpus

rules.title: Purpose and need are stated
rules.question: Does the EA package identify the purpose and need for action?
rules.requirement: The EA package should identify the purpose and need for the proposed action.
rules.source_query: environmental assessment purpose and need proposed action
rules.evidence_expectation: A supported finding requires one source-library evidence span and one package evidence span.

rules.title: Alternatives are described
rules.question: Does the EA package describe the proposed action and alternatives?
rules.requirement: The EA package should describe the proposed action and alternatives considered.
rules.source_query: environmental assessment alternatives proposed action environmental effects
rules.evidence_expectation: A supported finding requires one source-library evidence span and one package evidence span.

rules.title: Environmental effects are analyzed
rules.question: Does the EA package analyze affected environment and environmental effects?
rules.requirement: The EA package should analyze the affected environment and environmental effects of the action.
rules.source_query: environmental assessment affected environment environmental effects
rules.evidence_expectation: A supported finding requires one source-library evidence span and one package evidence span.

rules.title: Related environmental compliance is addressed
rules.question: Does the EA package address consultation or related environmental review laws?
rules.requirement: The EA package should address related environmental compliance topics when they are implicated by the action.
rules.package_query: consultation section 106 endangered species tribal water quality
rules.source_query: integrated environmental review compliance environmental review laws consultation
rules.evidence_expectation: A supported finding requires one source-library evidence span and one package evidence span.

rules.title: FONSI and mitigation support are traceable
rules.question: Does the EA package support the FONSI or decision notice with mitigation rationale where applicable?
rules.requirement: When the EA package relies on a FONSI, decision notice, or mitigation rationale, that support should be traceable.
rules.package_query: finding of no significant impact FONSI mitigation decision notice
rules.source_query: finding of no significant impact mitigation monitoring enforcement
rules.evidence_expectation: A supported finding requires one source-library evidence span and one package evidence span.
